name: float-suite
description: Offline-first creative & academic suite. Paint, vector, academic writing — all in your browser.

scripts.dist:paint:linux: electron-builder --linux deb rpm pacman AppImage --config apps/paint.json --publish never
scripts.dist:inkling:linux: electron-builder --linux deb rpm pacman AppImage --config apps/inkling.json --publish never
scripts.dist:thesis:linux: electron-builder --linux deb rpm pacman AppImage --config apps/thesis.json --publish never
scripts.dist:all:linux: npm run dist:paint:linux && npm run dist:inkling:linux && npm run dist:thesis:linux
scripts.dist:all:mac: npm run dist:paint:mac && npm run dist:inkling:mac && npm run dist:thesis:mac
scripts.dist:all:win: npm run dist:paint:win && npm run dist:inkling:win && npm run dist:thesis:win
